file:
PATH=/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin; export PATH; CACHE=/tmp/.bbc-rss; if [ ! -f $CACHE ] || [ $(( $(cut -d. -f1 /proc/uptime) - $(cat ${CACHE}.t 2>/dev/null || echo 0) )) -gt 60 ]; then wget -q -O $CACHE.new --timeout=5 http://10.0.2.2:8080/news.xml 2>/dev/null && mv $CACHE.new $CACHE && cut -d. -f1 /proc/uptime > ${CACHE}.t; fi; printf '
  __  __                                              _
 |  \/  |  Welcome to Uvwpmacoh                       |_)oot
 | |\/| |  on Debian GNU/Linux 13 (trixie)
 |_|  |_|  network-mounted, content-addressed, FUSE-served

  uptime %s s   |   load %s   |   mem %s kB free

' "$(cut -d. -f1 /proc/uptime)" "$(cut -d' ' -f1-3 /proc/loadavg)" "$(grep ^MemAvailable /proc/meminfo | tr -s ' ' | cut -d' ' -f2)"; if [ -s $CACHE ]; then echo '  -- BBC News --'; tr -d '
' < $CACHE | sed -e 's|<item>|
<item>|g' | grep -oE '<item>[[:space:]]*<title><!\[CDATA\[[^]]*\]\]>' | head -8 | sed -e 's|<item>[[:space:]]*<title><!\[CDATA\[|  • |' -e 's|\]\]>||'; echo; else echo '  (BBC News unreachable)'; echo; fi
